system: free massless Weyl Camporesi-Higuchi Dirac on round S^5
log_3_cancellation: Yes, log(3) coefficient = 0 exactly via the (1, -5/2, 9/16) algebraic combination across (s-4, s-2, s) shift

scalar_dirac_orthogonal_decomp_attempt.verdict: Paper 50 Theorem 3.4 does NOT extend to S^5
scalar_dirac_orthogonal_decomp_attempt.reason: M-engine ring is 3-dim on S^5 but only 2 free CFTs (scalar, Dirac); over-determined projection
scalar_dirac_orthogonal_decomp_attempt.needs: Third free CFT (e.g., higher-rank tensor or Maxwell-style) to complete dual basis on S^5
